name: single_key_default_sighash
provenance: Generated from deterministic libbitcoinpqc seed 0x20 plus an independent Python P2MR serializer; the vector signs the manually computed P2MRSighash digest with libbitcoinpqc and does not use qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.

name: single_key_sighash_single_matched_output
provenance: Generated by .context/gen_issue48_vectors.py using an independent Python P2MR serializer and libbitcoinpqc slh_dsa_keygen/slh_dsa_sign with deterministic 128-byte seed material; missing-output SIGHASH_SINGLE vectors intentionally have no p2mrSigMsg or p2mrSighash.
